ddls:
CREATE TABLE "size_charts" (
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size chart */,
  "size_label" TEXT /* Label for the size (e.g., UK 4, UK 6) */,
  "length_cm" REAL /* Length measurement in centimeters */,
  "bust_cm" REAL /* Bust measurement in centimeters */,
  "waist_cm" REAL /* Waist measurement in centimeters */,
  "shoulder_cm" REAL /* Shoulder measurement in centimeters */,
  "low_hip_cm" REAL /* Low hip measurement in centimeters */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the size chart */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the size chart was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the size chart */,
  "clothing_line_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the clothing line to which the size chart belongs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_clothing_line_id FOREIGN KEY ("clothing_line_id") REFERENCES clothing_lines ("clothing_line_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product (e.g., tops, bottoms) */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material used in the product */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color options available for the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand of the product */,
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size chart associated with the product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the product was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_size_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("size_chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size chart associated with the product */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "location" TEXT /* Warehouse or store location of the inventory */,
  "last_stock_update" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last stock update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_size_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("size_chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., designer, manager, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clothing_lines" (
  "clothing_line_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clothing line */,
  "line_name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing line */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the clothing line */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the clothing line was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the clothing line */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("clothing_line_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the brand was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the brand */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)
